Title: Core domain model and state machines
Description: Lock the launch object model, transition rules, hashing, idempotency, and event taxonomy before feature work branches.

Title: Auth, identity, and approval security
Description: Ship passkey-first identity, approval-link hardening, host trust records, and revocation paths that fail closed.

Title: Public API
Description: Expose the host-first Action Wallet lifecycle through a bounded public API with auth, idempotency, and docs.

Title: Action Wallet and policy engine
Description: Bind approval, standing rules, policy evaluation, and grant semantics into one bounded wallet envelope.

Title: Payments and settlement
Description: Launch one managed payment path, delay capture until verification passes, and bind money state into receipts.

Title: Evidence and verification
Description: Define evidence contracts, verify runs, generate receipts, and surface insufficiency or override paths.

Title: Consumer web surfaces
Description: Ship the wallet, approvals, receipts, disputes, integrations, and blocked-state surfaces users actually touch.

Title: Operator console
Description: Give operators the queue, detail, rescue, dispute, and audit surfaces needed to keep launch runs supportable.

Title: Host pack
Description: Package the public API through MCP, OpenClaw, SDKs, CLI, and reference integrations that get hosts to first approval fast.

Title: Observability, security, and reliability
Description: Instrument, alert, review, smoke-test, and harden the system so launch reliability is measurable and reversible.

Title: Docs, launch, and support
Description: Reset the narrative, publish the API and integration docs, and prepare launch, support, and post-launch operating artifacts.
